_comment_command: --- Command Settings --- | Name & Aliases (RESTART REQUIRED for these changes).
_comment_periods: --- Translation (Periods) --- | Customize the arguments for /playtime top <arg>

messages.reloadNoPermission: &cYou do not have permission to reload.
messages.noPermission: &cYou do not have permission to use this command.
messages.restReminderMsg: &e[HyperRewards] &7You've been playing for &e%session_time%&7. Consider taking a break!

_comment_gui: --- GUI Settings --- | Customize the text inside the leaderboard menu.
_comment_rewards: --- Rewards --- | Automatic playtime rewards. Use %player% in commands. Time is in milliseconds (1h = 3600000, 1d = 86400000). Set 'repeatable' to true for recurring rewards. Set 'world' to restrict to a specific world, or null for all. Use '/playtime template default' to load example rewards and milestones.
_comment_milestones: --- Milestones --- | Progression goals with rich actions. Can grant permissions, add to groups, run commands, and send messages. Great for rank-ups and achievements. Use 'repeatable: true' with daily/weekly/monthly periods for recurring goals. Use '/playtime template default' to load example milestones.
_comment_restReminder: --- Rest Reminders --- | Periodic messages suggesting players take a break. intervalMs is in milliseconds (2h = 7200000).

restReminder.message: &e[HyperRewards] &7You've been playing for &e%session_time%&7. Consider taking a break!

_comment_updates: --- Auto Updates --- | Checks GitHub for new releases on startup and notifies admins.
_comment_integrations: --- Integrations --- | HyperPerms is auto-detected. No configuration needed.
